name: Cranberry-Orange Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cranberries, oranges, raisins, and brown sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Cream the margarine until light and fluffy. Add egg and beat well.
3. Blend in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in the cranberry mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8 inch square baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until browned on top.
8. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cut into bars.
One bar - 86 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 1/2 fat exchange; 14 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams protein, 3 grams fat; 55 mg sodium, 78 mg potassium, 11 mg cholesterol.
